If you see a charge you don’t recognise or if you notice any inconsistencies, contact your bank immediately. Global Customer Assistance Service Lost your Visa card? Call +1 303 967 1090 from anywhere in the world. No matter where you are in the world, Visa’s Global Customer Assistance Services (GCAS) representatives can provide multilingual assistance 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. GCAS can help you block your Visa card within 30 minutes once it has been reported stolen or lost, protecting you against fraudulent transactions. GCAS can also provide emergency cash and Visa card replacement services wherever you are in the world. Explore Destinations
